title: No More Leaf Litter
description: Delete the idiotic Leaf Litter in world generation.
body:
![](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/110760354/533324508-895e31be-0fca-4b7a-aed7-929e1acee5c6.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3Njc4NzIyOTYsIm5iZiI6MTc2Nzg3MTk5NiwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMTA3NjAzNTQvNTMzMzI0NTA4LTg5NWUzMWJlLTBmY2EtNGI3YS1hZWQ3LTkyOWUxYWNlZTVjNi5wbmc_.a98AV3l2LQy9ql5F_4CbTxsc_APTcYU1aKk9hwGXI3w)
**A lightweight Minecraft datapack that completely removes naturally generated leaf litter from forests, dark forests, wooded badlands, and more in Java Edition 1.21.5+.**
